fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 12 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-19. Projects: repo-copilot, context-links, afo. Top concepts: D1-wired, getProfileBySlug, graceful-fallback, claude-migration, iPhone-native-deploy.
